content: {"cards": [{"name": "Skywatch Griffin", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Griffin", "oracle_text": "Flying\nVigilance", "flavor_text": "Ever watchful, the griffins of Skywatch Keep guard the mountain passes from dawn to dusk.", "power": "2", "toughness": "1", "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "White common flyer that's mechanically distinct from Radiant Pegasus. Uses vigilance instead of lifelink, trading the lifegain utility for the ability to attack and still defend. Stats are aggressive (2/1 for 3) but reasonable for common, giving white a solid aerial threat."}, {"name": "Nullify", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Counter target creature or enchantment spell.", "flavor_text": "\"Some threats are best dealt with before they manifest.\" \u2014Archmage Thessarian", "power": null, "toughness": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Blue counterspell that's mechanically distinct from Dispel the Weave. Instead of taxing any spell, this hard counters but only hits creatures and enchantments. More focused but reliable, fitting uncommon power level. Cheaper cost makes it playable."}, {"name": "Wither Away", "mana_cost": "{B}", "cmc": 1, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Destroy target creature with toughness 2 or less.", "flavor_text": "In the cursed marshlands, even the strongest warriors find their strength slowly ebbing away.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Black removal that's different from Fatal Strike (which targets by mana value). This targets by toughness, making it better against cheap utility creatures but worse against expensive low-toughness threats. 1 mana cost makes it efficient for common, but the restriction keeps it balanced."}, {"name": "Ember Blast", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "~ deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker.", "flavor_text": "The draconic forges burn hot enough to melt steel and sear flesh.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Red burn spell distinct from Molten Bolt. Does more damage (3 vs 2) but costs more (2 vs 1) and can't target players, only creatures/planeswalkers. This gives red good creature removal at common while maintaining the color's identity of not being the best at unconditional removal."}, {"name": "Thornwood Bear", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Bear", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "The bears of Thornwood have learned to push through any obstacle in their path to food.", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Green common beater that's simple and efficient. 2/2 trample for 2 mana follows the classic green template (like Kalonian Tusker's lineage). Trample is perfect for green's philosophy of breaking through with large creatures. Stats are fair for common - not undercosted but solid."}]}
